MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACZESNIAK SR., BRIAN A. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-20-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 504 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-26-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
RM 504, JUDGE CHOPPELAS - AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
KEVIN V. RYAN, JUDGE; G. ESPINOCILLA,CLERK; SONIA WONG, CSR. 10:42 AM COURT CONVENES. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. A SETTLE- MENT IS REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRIAS, AMANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 829 LONDON, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,256.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,256.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-06-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES, REMOVES ALL PERS PROP, & LEAVES PREMISES BROOM CLEAM BY 5PM 6-MAR-98, PLTF WILL WAIVE 2 MONTHS RENT ($1410) FROM THE JUDGMENT OF $2256. THE BAL OF $846 WILL BE DEDUCTED FROM SEC DEP. IF DEFT VACATES BY 5PM 6-MAR-98, THE PLTF WILL COOP W/ DEFT TO S/A JUDGMT & DISM COMPLT W/ PREJUD
